subject: Re: floor tile
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Friday, December 8, 2006 6:01:54 PM
Subject: floor tile


 Hello,


   I'm sorry but I was unable to find grey and white vinyl
floor tiles in stock in new york.  I will keep looking but do you
still want the other tiles ordered and shipped to the U.S.V.I. 
Once the order is placed we cannot cancel the order since the tiles are
customed. Also, the tiles (including shipping)  is $7,716.30. 


   Please let me know what you would like me to do, thanks.


         D B
